channel.title: Just Another Blog
channel.description: Recent content on Just Another Blog

item.title: Tree Traversals
item.description: Depth-First Search a. Pre-order traversal Traversing a tree involves iterating over its node in some order. I’m covering the DFS and BFS traversals. Depth-First Search a. Pre-order traversal ┌────61────┐ ┌─31─┐ ┌─80 27 51 68 61, 31, 27, 51, 80, 68 Visit the current node Recursively visit the left node.
